site.location_unavailable_firefox_mac: Firefox could not get a location from your Mac. This is usually a browser or macOS location-services issue, not a restriction from this site. Check macOS Location Services for Firefox, then try again. You can still enter a location label manually.

reports.title: Report Generator
reports.description: Generate internal summaries or workbook-ready donor reporting packages.
reports.project_summary_desc: Overview of a project: status, milestones, tasks, and team.
reports.financial_report_desc: Budget vs expenditure, disbursements, and performance metrics.
reports.donor_report_desc: Donor-facing report with project progress and financial data.
reports.agra_budget_breakdown_desc: Workbook export in AGRA's WRF budget-detail structure with grouped budget lines and quarterly splits.
reports.eif_annex_desc: Workbook export with logframe, work plans, and detailed budget structure.
reports.ppg_boost_desc: Workbook export for the PPG BOOST working sheet and Ethiopia cost build-up.
reports.configure_desc: Select your filters and output format, then generate.
reports.readiness_desc: See what is explicit in the reporting model and what will be backfilled from current project data.
reports.preview_select_project: Select a project to preview workbook readiness.
